description: A planner needs to ship three pallets and must select the most cost-effective Less-Than-Truckload (LTL) carrier.

nodes.task_description: Enter the shipment details: origin, destination, pallet count, dimensions, weight, and freight class.

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately enters all required LTL rating data.

nodes.task_description: Request rates from all contracted LTL carriers via a rating API.

expected_outcome.value: The system retrieves quotes from five different LTL carriers.

nodes.task_description: Review the quotes and select the carrier with the lowest price.

expected_outcome.value: Agent selects the cheapest carrier and books the shipment.
